O'SIG

President's Message

MENU

Dear Members,

We are delighted to see you among us, and congratulate you for this very important academic achievement. Remember that we are always there for you and will support you by doing our best to help you continue this desire and hard work throughout your medical education. The purpose of O’SIG is to help our faculty train students who; will be best in teamwork, able to think systematically, promote continuous self-renewing, understand health problems of Turkey and the world, have sufficient knowledge, skills and professionalism to solve them. O’SIG further aims to train future physicians, who know the national code of ethics, supervise and implement it and educate students who are open to learning latest skills and information at international level and use relevant technology in medical sciences and related fields.

Warm regards;

Founder and President, O’SIG
